summary: Lead started M5-TASK-GRAPH-001 after M4-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 closed on main and current milestone advanced to M5. This planning task creates or restores the M5 task graph only and does not start M5 production scope or Human Gate decisions.

tests_run.result: main was clean and synchronized to origin/main at 3e649ac5f739dfea75511ad0cb1193fc7df713aa before creating chore/m5-task-graph.
No READY M5 tasks existed before M5-TASK-GRAPH-001 was created.

decisions: Start M5 task graph planning as the next autonomous action after M4 exit closure.
Use systems_architect writer and independent qa_reviewer per M5 graph risk and process requirements.
Keep scope to planning/status/message files and do not start M5 production implementation.
Preserve Human Gates for M5 formal passage and manual node battle decision.
risks: M5 task graph must not convert Human Gate decisions into implementation tasks without explicit approval.
M4 Gate is PASS_WITH_LIMITS due accepted process limit and must not be restated as systems_architect acceptance.
requested_action: Create a minimal dependency-ordered M5 task DAG and a valid systems_architect REVIEW handoff routed to qa_reviewer. Do not implement M5 production scope.
